title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
